response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with deep full-stack and DLang experience, but the role requires a hands-on C++ specialist for industrial automation. Their C++ exposure is limited to an early-career role (NI LabWindows/CVI components) and a university thesis, with no recent professional C++, STL, or multi-threaded systems work. There is no evidence of MQTT, message brokers in C++ contexts, IEC 62443/SDL practices, or industrial protocol experience, making them a poor fit despite general seniority.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of requests/sec, async I/O, caching)
Strong engineering culture: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring via workshops, dojos, and courses
concerns: C++ experience is dated and limited; recent work is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang
No industrial cybersecurity, IEC 62443, or Secure Development Lifecycle background
No MQTT, industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA), or automation-domain exposure

key_factors.factor: Lack of recent C++/STL professional experience
No industrial automation or IEC 62443 security background
Strong general seniority and systems performance experience
